turns.user: ﻿T?m repo GitHub trending v? AI agents vi?t b?ng Python trong tu?n n?y
turns.assistant_text:
Dưới đây là danh sách các repo GitHub trending về AI agents bằng Python trong tuần này:

1. [NousResearch/hermes-agent](https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent) - The agent that grows with you | ⭐176420
2. [langchain-ai/langchain](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langchain) - The agent engineering platform. | ⭐138291
3. [browser-use/browser-use](https://github.com/browser-use/browser-use) - 🌐 Make websites accessible for AI agents. Automate tasks online with ease. | ⭐96628
4. [infiniflow/ragflow](https://github.com/infiniflow/ragflow) - RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that fuses cutting-edge RAG with Agent capabilities to create a superior context layer for LLMs | ⭐81703
5. [bytedance/deer-flow](https://github.com/bytedance/deer-flow) - An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. | ⭐70247
6. [ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-skills](https://github.com/ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-skills) - A curated list of awesome Claude Skills, resources, and tools for customizing Claude AI workflows | ⭐62871
7. [mem0ai/mem0](https://github.com/mem0ai/mem0) - Universal memory layer for AI Agents | ⭐57370
8. [crewAIInc/crewAI](https://github.com/crewAIInc/crewAI) - Framework for orchestrating role-playing, autonomous AI agents. | ⭐52637
9. [zhayujie/CowAgent](https://github.com/zhayujie/CowAgent) - Open-source super AI assistant & Agent Harness. | ⭐45017
10. [HKUDS/nanobot](https://github.com/HKUDS/nanobot) - Lightweight, open-source AI agent for your tools, chats, and workflows. | ⭐43508

Nếu bạn cần thêm thông tin chi tiết về bất kỳ repo nào, hãy cho tôi biết!

items.title: bytedance/deer-flow
items.summary: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours. | ⭐70247 | Lang: Python

items.summary: Framework for orchestrating role-playing, autonomous AI agents. By fostering collaborative intelligence, CrewAI empowers agents to work together seamlessly, tackling complex tasks. | ⭐52637 | Lang: Python

items.title: zhayujie/CowAgent
items.summary: Open-source super AI assistant & Agent Harness. Plans tasks, runs tools and skills, autonomously grows with memory and knowledge. Multi-model, multi-channel. Lightweight, extensible, one-line install. | ⭐45017 | Lang: Python

items.summary: Lightweight, open-source AI agent for your tools, chats, and workflows. | ⭐43508 | Lang: Python
